Off Calendar Feb-08-2023 Continued To Apr-04-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-31-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sean Patrick Miller, via Zoom, for and with Kevin Woodard, Petitioner.

Counsel reports regarding his failure to appear at the last calling of this matter. The court advises as to its tentative ruling and points to probate code 6124 presumption. Counsel submits. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated Dec-20-1987 is admitted to probate. Kevin C. Woodard is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jun-06-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. The Amended Order to Appear is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Glisson. Not Reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-31-2022 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-21-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-19-2022 Continued To May-31-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Proposed Executor Kevin Woodard and Attorney Sean Patrick Miller to appear on May-31-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear. The hearing on the petition for probate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not reported.
